companies.notes: Dual strategy: OpenAI APIs in Zia + proprietary Zia LLM (trained on NVIDIA) for data-sovereign customers. MCP server for agents. Supports Llama, DeepSeek. Bootstrapped.

enrichment.website_title: Zoho | Cloud Software Suite for Businesses
enrichment.website_description: A unique and powerful software suite for businesses of all sizes. With 55+ applications, Zoho is trusted by 130 million+ users for their end-to-end business needs.

enrichment.website_title: Paytm: Secure & Fast UPI Payments, Recharge Mobile & Pay Bills
enrichment.website_description: Send money with UPI using any bank account. Recharge mobile and pay bills.

companies.product: E-commerce ("Amazon of Korea") — fine-tunes open-source LLMs, launched Coupang Intelligent Cloud (GPU-as-a-Service)

companies.product: E-commerce — AI shopping assistants, multimodal search (Flipkart Immerse), GEO optimization for LLM chatbots
companies.estimated_volume_tier: Very High — ~$25B GMV, 500M+ registered users, evaluating multi-provider LLM strategy
